title: milla sellowiana
intro: Milla sellowiana, also known as the golden sedge or yellow sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Liliaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Milla sellowiana include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Milla sellowiana include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
